content.problemStatement:
For an array BBB of length MMM, suppose F(B)=‚ąĎi=1M‚ąí1(‚ąí1)i+1‚ą£Bi‚ąíBi+1‚ą£7F(B) = \sum_{i=1}^{M-1} (-1)^{i+1} {|B_i - B_{i+1}|}^7F(B)=‚ąĎi=1M‚ąí1‚Äč(‚ąí1)i+1‚ą£Bi‚Äč‚ąíBi+1‚Äč‚ą£7.

You are given an array AAA of length NNN.

Find the **sum** of F(S)F(S)F(S) over all non-empty subsequences SSS of AAA. Since the sum might be too large, please print it modulo 998244353998244353998244353.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN ‚ÄĒ the length of the array AAA.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1,A_2,\ldots,A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč representing the array AAA.




Output Format
For each test case, output the required sum modulo 998244353998244353998244353.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 5‚čÖ1055 \cdot 10^55‚čÖ105.
